understanding.goal_understanding: Place every selectable piece onto a goal tile marked '+' simultaneously. Multiple goals require all to be occupied at once to win the level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: CLICK selects a piece or moves the currently selected piece toward the clicked position if a valid path exists. MOVE_RIGHT shifts the selected piece one step right when unblocked. Pieces cannot move through walls or obstacles. Actions that fail due to blocks still consume a step. The game ends after steps are exhausted.

history.summary: Level 1 step budget exhausted.
Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Place every selectable piece onto a goal tile marked '+' simultaneously. Multiple goals require all to be occupied at once to win the level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: CLICK selects a piece or moves the currently selected piece toward the clicked position if a valid path exists. MOVE_RIGHT shifts the selected piece one step right when unblocked. Pieces cannot move through walls or obstacles. Actions that fail due to blocks still consume a step. The game ends after steps are exhausted.
